MktCalcInsightObjectDef.expression: SELECT Web_Event_c_Home__dll.Account_c__c AS AccountId__c, count(Web_Event_c_Home__dll.Event_Type_c__c) AS WebEventCount__c, sum(Web_Event_c_Home__dll.Time_On_Page_c__c) AS TotalDwellSeconds__c, max(Web_Event_c_Home__dll.Occurred_At_c__c) AS LastWebActivity__c FROM Web_Event_c_Home__dll WHERE Web_Event_c_Home__dll.Account_c__c IS NOT NULL GROUP BY Web_Event_c_Home__dll.Account_c__c
